headline: Procter And Gamble Resets Priorities With New CEO And Dreft Overhaul
summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) has announced a CEO transition from Jon R. Moeller to Shailesh Jejurikar. The company is launching a two year restructuring plan focused on portfolio simplification, supply chain efficiency, and organizational redesign. P&G is also refreshing its Dreft baby detergent line, including changes to packaging, product names, and formulas. Procter & Gamble, the consumer products group behind brands across home and personal care, is pairing a leadership change with a...
